## Bug summary

What was broken? Include expected vs actual behavior.

## Root cause

Explain the underlying cause.

## Fix

Describe the implemented fix.

## Linked issue

Fixes #

## Validation

- [ ] Added/updated test covering the bug
- [ ] Ran relevant test suite locally
- [ ] Verified no regressions in related flows

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is limited to this bug
- [ ] Error handling/messages updated if relevant
- [ ] Docs updated if user behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots/video attached (if UI changes)
